sourcePrompt: A C-130 Hercules tactical transport, about thirty meters long, squatting low on stubby gear housed in fuselage sponsons. A fat round-nosed fuselage rides under a high straight wing carrying four turboprops with broad propellers; the rear fuselage sweeps up over a full-width cargo ramp, and a tall slab tail fin rises above it. The stance is flat and ground-hugging, built for dirt strips. Olive-drab and tan camouflage, broad-shouldered and workmanlike.
